title: Raccoon Removal in Farmingdale, Long Island | $900 – $4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Farmingdale, NY. Licensed experts handle raccoon infestations safely and humanely. Same-day service available. Call now for a free quote!
intro: Dealing with raccoons in your Farmingdale home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services tailored to Long Island properties. Our experienced technicians use humane, effective methods to remove raccoons and prevent future intrusions, with pricing ranging from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Farmingdale and the greater Long Island area for years, understanding the unique challenges raccoons pose to local residential and commercial properties. Our licensed professionals offer same-day emergency service, humane removal techniques, full exclusion work, and warranties on all services.
localContext: Farmingdale's mix of suburban homes, the historic Main Street district, and proximity to Bethpage State Park creates ideal conditions for raccoon activity, especially in attics, chimneys, and around commercial dumpsters near Route 110. The tree-lined residential neighborhoods and older homes with accessible entry points make professional raccoon exclusion particularly important for Farmingdale property owners.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Farmingdale?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Farmingdale typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on factors like the number of raccoons, location of the nest, extent of damage, and necessary exclusion work. A simple single raccoon removal may cost around $900, while extensive infestations with multiple entry points and attic damage can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Farmingdale, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Farmingdale due to the abundance of food sources, mature trees, and both residential and commercial properties with accessible shelter. They're particularly active near wooded areas, around trash receptacles on Main Street, and in attics of older homes. Raccoon activity increases in spring when mothers seek nesting sites and in fall when they prepare for winter.

faqs.question: What are signs of raccoons in my Farmingdale home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include nocturnal scratching or thumping sounds in attics or walls, torn shingles or damaged soffits, tipped-over garbage cans, raccoon droppings on your roof or property, visible paw prints, and strong odors from urine or nesting areas. You may also notice damage to lawns where raccoons dig for grubs or see them active at night around your property.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in Farmingdale humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, New York State-compliant removal methods. We use live trapping and exclusion techniques that safely remove raccoons without harm. All our technicians are licensed and follow local Farmingdale and Long Island regulations regarding wildlife removal, including proper relocation practices and timing considerations for mothers with young.
